text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo is having some trouble during
practice...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... Why was it... so hard to breathe... midway
through...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Such a feeble stride is unbecoming a king...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oh, yes... I'm fine. It's... not a problem.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
A first-rate runner does not fall apart from such
trivial loads. There must be something else
wrong...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Next time, I'll show you what a truly powerful
stride looks like!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, even after saying that, King Halo still
can't find her usual vigor.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The repeated races may be taking a toll on her. I
think we need to make some changes to her
schedule...
